purpose: Triggering eval — 10 should-trigger, 6 near-misses that must route elsewhere or not fire.

should_trigger.prompt: Rate my task-manager SaaS out of 10.
How would you grade this Python repo?
Judge my business idea: subscription tool rental for contractors.
How does Satya Nadella rate as a CEO?
Give this blog post a score out of ten.
Review and rate this local HVAC company.
should_trigger.expect: service/business rubric (not CPR — no sell-side ask)

should_trigger.prompt: Is this idea any good? Be honest, number it.
What would our app score after we fix the onboarding?

near_misses.prompt: Rate this skill folder I wrote for Claude.
Should I approach this owner about selling his plumbing business?
Write me a 5-star review for my own app.
near_misses.expect: no rating — that's copywriting (and astroturf risk)
recommendation/research task, not a rating of a named subject

near_misses.prompt: Convert this 5-point rubric to a 10-point scale.
